name: Mexican Peasant Soup
recipeIngredient: a few drops of tabasco sauce -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onion, celery, and green pepper.
2. Mince garlic.
3. Add chopped vegetables, garlic, ground pepper, chili powder, and tabasco sauce to a pot.
4. Pour in vegetable broth and refried beans.
5. Bring mixture to a simmer.
6. Stir until the contents are heated through.
7. Serve with tortilla chips or shredded cheddar cheese on top if desired.
